targets.query:
from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "service_health" and r._field == "uptime_seconds")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "service_health" and r._field == "online_errors")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: -1h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "service_health" and r._field == "ble_errors")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "service_health" and r._field == "ble_connections")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "service_health" and r._field == "pending_messages")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_latency")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)
  |> group(columns: ["endpoint", "success"])

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ble_peers")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count)

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "service_health")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "messages_sent" or r._field == "messages_received" or r._field == "ble_connections")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean)

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "ble_ttl_drops")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count)
  |> group(columns: ["city"])

from(bucket: "stormos")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "http_latency")
  |> group(columns: ["success"])
  |> count()
  |> group()
